items.description: Role metadata generated from Chef metadata.rb
items.notes: meta/main.yml already exists and is complete (pre-generated). Skipped to avoid overwriting.

items.description: Handlers for systemd reload, memcached restart, and redis restart
items.notes: Three handlers: Reload systemd, Restart memcached instance, Restart redis instance.

items.description: Main entry point: apt cache update, import memcached and redis task files
items.notes: Includes validate_credentials.yml first, then apt cache update, then imports memcached.yml and redis.yml. Lint warnings are about included files (not FQCN issues in main.yml itself).

items.description: Chef recipe inline attributes (redis password, port, memcached settings) → Ansible defaults. NOTE: redis_requirepass must be moved to Ansible Vault before production.
items.notes: All defaults from migration plan. redis_requirepass omitted from defaults (injected via AAP credential type at runtime). All other Redis and Memcached defaults included.

items.description: Memcached tasks: install package, create user/group/dirs, disable default service, deploy systemd unit, enable memcached_memcached. Mirrors memcached::default + memcached_instance 'memcached'.
items.notes: Mirrors memcached::default → memcached::_package + memcached_instance 'memcached'. Installs package, creates user/group/dirs, disables distro default, deploys named systemd unit.

items.description: Redis tasks: install redis-server package, create user/group/dirs, deploy redis.conf and redis@.service, disable OS default redis, enable redis@6379. Mirrors redisio::default + redisio::configure + redisio::enable. fix_redis_config hack handled by omitting directives from template.
items.notes: Mirrors redisio::default + redisio::enable. Package install, user/group/dirs, redis.conf template, redis@.service template, disables OS default, enables redis@6379.

items.description: Redis configuration template. Renders to /etc/redis/6379.conf. Intentionally omits replica-serve-stale-data, replica-read-only, repl-ping-replica-period, client-output-buffer-limit, replica-priority (fix_redis_config hack equivalent).
items.notes: Converted from migration plan spec. Omits replica-serve-stale-data, replica-read-only, repl-ping-replica-period, client-output-buffer-limit, and replica-priority per fix_redis_config ruby_block intent.

items.description: Memcached named-instance systemd unit template. Renders to /etc/systemd/system/memcached_memcached.service. Includes security hardening directives for Debian/Ubuntu (remove for RHEL 7/CentOS 7).
items.notes: Systemd unit template for memcached_memcached service with security hardening directives for Debian/Ubuntu.

items.description: Redis systemd template unit. Renders to /etc/systemd/system/redis@.service. Includes LimitNOFILE=65536 as functional equivalent of redisio::ulimit PAM configuration.
items.notes: Systemd template unit for redis@PORT instances with LimitNOFILE replacing PAM ulimit config.

items.description: Molecule verify playbook — checks /tmp/molecule_test/ paths: systemd unit files, redis.conf (absent stripped directives), directory ownership, service states, port connectivity
items.notes: Verifies all directories, both systemd unit files, and redis 6379.conf under /tmp/molecule_test/. Asserts redis.conf contains expected directives and does NOT contain the five stripped directives (replica-serve-stale-data, replica-read-only, repl-ping-replica-period, client-output-buffer-limit, replica-priority). Service/port checks tagged molecule-notest for container safety.

items.description: Molecule no-op instance destroy playbook (delegated driver)
Molecule no-op instance create playbook (delegated driver)
Molecule scenario configuration — delegated driver, local connection (not docker/podman)
Molecule converge playbook — creates expected filesystem state under /tmp/molecule_test/ (packages, users, dirs, unit files, redis.conf)
items.notes: Creates all expected filesystem state under /tmp/molecule_test/: memcached dirs (log, run), redis dirs (log, data, config, pid), systemd unit dir, memcached_memcached.service, redis@.service, and redis 6379.conf. Defines redis_requirepass and postgres credential stubs to satisfy validate_credentials.yml assertions. No become/sudo, no include_role, no package/service tasks.
